## Text Formatting

I want to see **mountains** again, Gandalf _You talking to me?_ It's alive! <u>It's alive!</u> One, two, ~~five!~~, three! The name's Bond. ||James Bond|| You're a ==wizard==, Harry `I'm sorry, Dave.`

I understood that reference

Show any emotion with custom emoji 🎉🧐😓

Keep track of important dates Aug 13, 2013

## Structure

> Also available in multiple lines With **formatting**
> for useful context, and not just jokes

- To the point
- [x] Mission Accomplished

1. Step 1
2. Step 2
3. ???
4. Profit

Communicate with the machines
